name: PSB Financial, Inc.
business: PSB Financial, Inc. is a bank holding company that through its subsidiary Pioneer State Bank (formerly Pioneer Federal) provides banking services, primarily residential mortgage loans and commercial real estate loans, to customers in its primary market area in Montana.

exposures.sentence: At December 31, 2025, one- to four-family residential mortgage loans (including residential construction loans) totaled $79.5 million or 87.1% of total loans.
At December 31, 2025, commercial real estate loans totaled $7.1 million or 7.8% of total loans.

catalysts.sentence: The deadline for submitting orders to purchase shares of common stock in the subscription offering and in any community offering is 12:00 noon, Mountain time, on April 21, 2026

catalysts.event: Special meeting to vote on conversion
catalysts.sentence: A special meeting of members to consider and vote upon the plan of conversion has been scheduled for April 28, 2026

catalysts.event: Expected start of trading of common stock
catalysts.sentence: We expect trading in the common stock to begin on the business day of or on the business day immediately following the completion of the stock offering and conversion.
